market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Stylish Free Parking Flat in Heart of the City
Free Parking, £151.4 per night - Top Location!
analysis.rewritten_desc: Our luxurious and bright 1-bedroom flat is the perfect home away from home for up to 4 guests. Located in the heart of the city, enjoy the convenience of free parking and all the local amenities at your fingertips. With a 4.94 rating and 17 glowing reviews, you can trust that this property is a gem. The flat features a spacious open-plan living area, a fully equipped kitchen, and a comfortable bedroom with plenty of storage. With 66 open nights over the next 3 months, this is a fantastic opportunity to secure a booking at a competitive rate (£151.4 per night). Book now and experience the best of [location]!
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor amenities, such as a garden or rooftop terrace, would be highly valued by guests and could increase occupancy by 10-15%.
A TV with streaming services or a DVD player would make the entertainment experience more enjoyable for guests.
A washing machine or dryer would be a welcome addition for guests who value convenience and don't want to worry about laundry
analysis.photo_order_rec: The living area should be the cover photo, showcasing the open-plan space and the large windows that let in plenty of natural light.
key_diagnosis: With a nightly rate £23.6 below the median (£175.00) and occupancy 3.1% below the cohort median, increasing the nightly rate to match the median could have a significant impact on bookings.
Adding outdoor amenities, such as a garden or rooftop terrace, could increase occupancy by 10-15% and boost competitiveness with other listings.
Including photos of the property's amenities and features could increase occupancy by 5-8% and make the listing more attractive to guests.
analysis.outreach_hook: By adding outdoor amenities and increasing your nightly rate to £175.00, you could increase occupancy by 10-15% and fill 20-30 open nights over the next 3 months.
